text: Confirming will allow this site to view balances and activity for the selected account.

classification.rationale: A consent/disclosure sentence: 'Confirming will allow this site to view balances and activity for the selected account.' Weight+Space (stable) inner attitude — decisions taken, structurally settled, intelligent ruler mode. Aspect is penetrating (Space-led — it orients the user to exactly what will be granted, scanning the permission boundary). Stress is time (quick): the action is contingent on an imminent 'Confirming', pressing toward resolution. Tempo Practical within Stable — functional, transactional, no flourish. Motor pressing → punching: force-lands the implication of the permission.
classification.literary_anchor: A solicitor reading the terms of a deed — Tywin Lannister's chamberlain, not the king himself.

text: Only connect to websites you trust

classification.rationale: 'Only connect to websites you trust' — a security warning with weight and moral authority. Stable inner (Weight+Space): ruler-mode, settled conviction. Aspect enclosing (Weight-led): the warning wraps and protects the user, not a spatial scan but a holding gesture. Stress time, pole sustained: 'only' holds a long caution rather than a snapped command — there is urgency but it is measured, parental. Tempo Commanding: the single declarative prohibition has full stable authority. Transient Unsociable flash (Remote family): the curt 'only' isolation carries a brief aristocratic-aloof refusal beat — carved off, distancing. Motor pressing → punching.
classification.literary_anchor: Aragorn to a young Hobbit: 'Trust no road you have not walked.'

text: This is not an address you've interacted with recently. Please proceed with caution.

classification.rationale: The warning copy scans the spatial situation ('not an address you've interacted with recently') and flags structural risk — that's Awake territory (Space+Time), alert-sensor orientation. But the hedged, cautious framing ('Please proceed with caution') tips it toward Uncertain rather than Acute or Doubting. The probe is penetrating (Space-led: mapping relational topology). Stress lands on space (orientation/scanning), pole flexible (the hedge rather than a hard block). Motor: floating → flicking (Light-Flexible — a soft alert rather than a hard stop). The curt structural refusal flashes a transient Unsociable beat (Remote family — carved-off, withdrawn from warmth).
classification.literary_anchor: Horatio warning Hamlet not to follow the Ghost — alert, oriented, cautious but non-commanding

text: Domain found on blocklists maintained by: Blowfish. This website is very likely to be a scam. If you believe this is a mistake, please contact them.

classification.rationale: The prose is structurally settled and information-delivering: it names the authority source (Blowfish), renders a verdict ('very likely to be a scam'), then opens a narrow escape route ('contact them'). That sequence — authority → verdict → narrow corridor — reads Stable, penetrating (Space-led: it orients the reader within an information structure), time-stressed quick (the warning must land before the user acts). Motor: pressing → punching (Strong-Direct force-landing). The curt carved-off tone of 'contact them' flashes a transient Remote-family Unsociable beat. Literary anchor: a magistrate reading a charge sheet.
classification.literary_anchor: Magistrate / Logan Roy issuing a formal warning with a reluctant appeal route

text: For your safety, Phantom has blocked this request.

classification.rationale: 'For your safety' foregrounds relational care and body-protection — that's Near territory (Weight + Time, down-to-earth and relational). The aspect is enclosing: the brand wraps itself around the user as a protective presence (Weight-led). Stress is flow, pole bound: the holding-back is felt as contained, continuous care rather than a sharp time-cut. Motor: gliding → dabbing (Light-Direct warm-touch). A transient Commanding beat flashes in 'has blocked this request' — the institutional authority of the action is Stable-family, but it resolves back into the warm protective register. Literary anchor: Anthony Bourdain saying 'I wouldn't eat that' — casual authority delivered with genuine personal concern.
classification.literary_anchor: Anthony Bourdain / the Nurse (R&J) — protective relational register with an undertone of institutional authority
